versions.description: 7 Days to Die Discord bridge with chat relay, localized monitoring events, blood moon notices, and a persistent customizable server status message.
versions.configSchema: {"$schema":"http://json-schema.org/draft-07/schema#","type":"object","properties":{"language":{"type":"string","enum":["en","pl"],"default":"en","description":"Built-in message preset. Any non-empty message override takes precedence."},"chatChannelId":{"type":"string","default":"","description":"Discord channel ID for player chat relay."},"monitoringChannelId":{"type":"string","default":"","description":"Discord channel ID for system/death/join/leave/blood moon/status messages."},"relayDiscordToGame":{"type":"boolean","default":true,"description":"Relay messages from the Discord chat channel into game chat."},"relayGameToDiscord":{"type":"boolean","default":true,"description":"Relay in-game chat messages to the Discord chat channel."},"monitorJoins":{"type":"boolean","default":true},"monitorLeaves":{"type":"boolean","default":true},"monitorDeaths":{"type":"boolean","default":true},"privateBloodMoonNoticeOnFirstJoin":{"type":"boolean","default":false,"description":"Privately notify the first player online when the persisted Blood Moon phase is today or starting."},"joinMessageTemplate":{"type":"string","maxLength":500,"default":"","description":"Optional join-message override. Placeholder: {player}."},"leaveMessageTemplate":{"type":"string","maxLength":500,"default":"","description":"Optional leave-message override. Placeholder: {player}."},"deathMessageTemplate":{"type":"string","maxLength":500,"default":"","description":"Optional death-message override. Placeholder: {player}."},"deathWithReasonMessageTemplate":{"type":"string","maxLength":500,"default":"","description":"Optional death-message override when a reason is available. Placeholders: {player}, {reason}."},"serverStartingMessageTemplate":{"type":"string","maxLength":500,"default":"","description":"Optional server-online message override. Placeholder: {serverName}."},"serverOfflineMessageTemplate":{"type":"string","maxLength":500,"default":"","description":"Optional server-offline message override. Placeholder: {serverName}."},"emptyPlayerListText":{"type":"string","maxLength":100,"default":"","description":"Optional text shown when no players are online."},"unknownPlayerText":{"type":"string","maxLength":100,"default":"","description":"Optional fallback when an event has no player name."},"updateStatusMessage":{"type":"boolean","default":true,"description":"Update one persistent bot message with current server status instead of posting a new status every tick."},"statusTemplate":{"type":"string","maxLength":500,"default":"","description":"Optional server-status override. Placeholders: {onlinePlayers}, {playerList}, {day}, {time}, {bloodMoonIcon}, {serverName}."},"bloodMoonIcon":{"type":"string","maxLength":50,"default":" ⭒ 🩸"},"timeConsoleCommand":{"type":"string","enum":["gettime"],"default":"gettime"},"hordeIntervalDays":{"type":"integer","minimum":1,"default":7},"firstHordeDay":{"type":"integer","minimum":1,"default":7},"bloodMoonStartHour":{"type":"integer","minimum":0,"maximum":23,"default":22},"bloodMoonEndHour":{"type":"integer","minimum":0,"maximum":23,"default":4},"bloodMoonTodayMessage":{"type":"string","maxLength":500,"default":"","description":"Optional blood-moon-day message override."},"privateBloodMoonTodayMessage":{"type":"string","maxLength":500,"default":"","description":"Optional private first-player Blood Moon notice override. The selected language preset is used when empty."},"bloodMoonStartingMessage":{"type":"string","maxLength":500,"default":"","description":"Optional blood-moon-starting message override."},"bloodMoonEndingMessage":{"type":"string","maxLength":500,"default":"","description":"Optional blood-moon-ending message override."}},"required":[],"additionalProperties":false}

commands.name: serverstats
commands.helpText: Shows online player count, current day, time, and blood moon indicator.

hooks.name: discordChatRelay
hooks.description: Relays Discord chat channel messages into game chat.

hooks.name: gameChatRelay
hooks.description: Relays in-game chat messages to Discord chat channel.

hooks.name: monitorJoin
hooks.description: Sends player join messages to the monitoring channel.

hooks.name: monitorLeave
hooks.description: Sends player leave messages to the monitoring channel.

hooks.name: monitorDeath
hooks.description: Sends player death messages to the monitoring channel.

hooks.name: monitorServerStatus
hooks.description: Sends server online and offline messages to the monitoring channel.

cronJobs.name: updateStatus
cronJobs.description: Updates the persistent Discord server status message.

cronJobs.name: bloodMoonMonitor
cronJobs.description: Checks 7D2D phase transitions every minute and sends blood moon day/start/end notices.

functions.name: discord-7d2d-status-helpers
